allow: PowerShell(foreach \($procId in 4128, 11852\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Killed PID $procId" } catch { Write-Output \("Could not kill {0}: {1}" -f $procId, $_\) } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; foreach \($port in 3000, 3001\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "Port $port still listening" } else { Write-Output "Port $port free" } })
